title: Repair MeshCore identity test Kconfig
description: net.lichen.meshcore_adapter.identity aborts before compilation on native_sim because STACK_CANARIES lacks entropy and LICHEN_LINK selects TINYCRYPT_SHA256 while TINYCRYPT=n. Base scenario passes 61 cases, but identity paths remain unvalidated. Correct checked-in test configuration without weakening warnings-as-errors.
